title: Failed to load cached network config: network podman not found in CNI cache, falling back to loading network podman from disk
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

1. sudo yum module enable -y container-tools:ol8  

3. sudo yum module install -y container-tools:ol8  

4.podman pull redis

5.podman run redis

**Describe the results you received:**

```
WARN[0000] Failed to load cached network config: network podman not found in CNI cache, falling back to loading network podman from disk
WARN[0000] 1 error occurred:
        * plugin type="bridge" failed (delete): cni plugin bridge failed: running [/usr/sbin/iptables -t nat -D POSTROUTING -s 10.88.0.13 -j CNI-aa6da408308d6bbee9454591 -m comment --comment name: "podman" id: "c6c716dd87c721be2ee4433c6eb016c871c381f512ccacfed8d957e10708a4c8" --wait]: exit status 2: iptables v1.8.4 (nf_tables): Couldn't load match `comment':No such file or directory

Try `iptables -h' or 'iptables --help' for more information.
```

Error: plugin type="bridge" failed (add): cni plugin bridge failed: failed to list chains: running [/usr/sbin/iptables -t nat -S --wait]: exit status 4: # Warning: iptables-legacy tables present, use iptables-legacy to see them
iptables v1.8.4 (nf_tables):  CHAIN_ADD failed (No such file or directory): chain PREROUTING

**Describe the results you expected:**


**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```

Version:      4.0.2
API Version:  4.0.2
Go Version:   go1.17.7

Built:      Tue May 17 09:00:36 2022
OS/Arch:    linux/amd64
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md)**


Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

win11 
wsl2 
oracle linux 8.6

ip a output

```
7: cni-podman0: <NO-CARRIER,BROADCAST,MULTICAST,UP> mtu 1500 qdisc noqueue state DOWN group default qlen 1000
    link/ether 56:99:34:ba:39:5a brd ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
    inet 10.88.0.1/16 brd 10.88.255.255 scope global cni-podman0
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
    inet6 fe80::5499:34ff:feba:395a/64 scope link
       valid_lft forever preferred_lft forever
```

comments.body: You cannot use iptables-nft on wsl, this is a know wsl issue (https://github.com/microsoft/WSL/issues/6044). You have to use iptables-legacy and I am not sure if this is available on RHEL distros.
